overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a hooded character walking along a foggy mountain cobblestone path. The character briefly stops to harvest a mountain flower from a large animal skull before continuing through the misty, rocky terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty mountain trail between rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path through the foggy mountain terrain, passing remains on the roadside

entered.detail: winding stone path cutting through the mountain valley
steep rocky terrain forming the left boundary of the trail
steep rocky terrain forming the right boundary of the trail
dark shapes of dead creatures lying on the right side of the path
tall evergreen trees visible through the fog in the distance
large bleached animal skull with antlers resting on rocks beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy cobblestone path winding through a narrow mountain valley. Rocky cliffs flank both sides while scattered pine trees emerge from the mist ahead. The remains of dead creatures lie on the right roadside as the character approaches a large animal skull.

scene_state.functional_zone: roadside with large animal skull remains

events.description: character turns left toward the large skull on the roadside
character harvests a mountain flower from the skull remains, indicated by on-screen UI prompt

agents.ego_description: turning toward the large skull and harvesting a plant from the remains before preparing to move on

segments.scene_description: The character turns left to approach the large bleached skull resting on the rocks. The camera moves closer to the skull as the character harvests a mountain flower from it, indicated by a UI prompt. The right cliff and earlier remains pass out of view as the focus shifts to the interaction.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain path with distant valley views

events.description: character turns back to face forward and resumes walking along the path

agents.ego_description: continuing down the cobblestone path away from the skull, heading deeper into the foggy valley toward distant peaks

entered.detail: fog-shrouded mountain peaks visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: After harvesting the flower, the character turns back to the path and continues walking deeper into the valley. The skull and left cliff fall behind as distant mountain peaks become visible through the fog ahead. The trail continues winding between the rocky terrain toward the misty horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a foggy mountain path that shifts from a narrow valley corridor to an open vista of distant peaks. It begins with the character walking along a winding cobblestone trail flanked by rocky cliffs and scattered pine trees, passing the remains of dead creatures. As the character turns left, the camera closes in on a large bleached animal skull to capture the harvesting of a mountain flower, causing the surrounding cliffs to fall out of view. The scene then shifts back to the main trail as the character resumes their journey, leaving the skull behind. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the valley, where the mist begins to part to reveal towering mountain peaks on the horizon.
